zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Clopton於大約1321年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德時，他的父親Walter De Clopton25歲，母親Alice Fitzhugh23歲。他於大約1379年與Katherine Mylde在英國英格蘭素福爾可克萊爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1383年10月12日在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可肯特維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Clopton于大约1321年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可朗 梅爾福德时，他的父亲Walter De Clopton25岁，母亲Alice Fitzhugh23岁。他于大约1379年与Katherine Mylde在英国英格兰素福爾可克萊爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1383年10月12日在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可肯特維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Clopton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for examplein Essex, Suffolk, and Warwickshire, named Clopton from Old Englishclopp(a) ‘rock, hill’ + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Clopton was born about 1321, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter De Clopton, was 25 and his mother, Alice Fitzhugh, was 23. He married Katherine Mylde about 1379, in Clare, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 12 October 1383, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Kentwell, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Clopton est né environ 1321, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter De Clopton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Fitzhugh, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Mylde environ 1379, à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1383, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Kentwell, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United K: Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Clopton um 1321 in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter De Clopton 25 und seine Mutter Alice Fitzhugh 23. Er hat um 1379 in Clare, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Katherine Mylde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1383 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kentwell, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clopton è nato il circa 1321 nel Long Melford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Walter De Clopton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Fitzhugh, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Mylde circa 1379, nel Clare, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 ottobre 1383, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Kentwell, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Cloptonが約1321年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードで生まれた時，父Walter De Cloptonは25歳，母Alice Fitzhughは23歳であった。約1379年にイギリスイギリススフォルククラーでKatherine Myldeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1383年10月12日に故郷で63歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクケントウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Clopton(이)가 대략 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter De Clopton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Fitzhugh(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1379년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 클래르에서 Katherine Mylde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1383년 10월 12일 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 켄트웰에 묻혔다.

pt.Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United K: Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clopton nasceu aproximadamente 1321, em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter De Clopton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Fitzhugh, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Mylde aproximadamente 1379, em Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1383, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Clopton родился около 1321 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter De Clopton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Fitzhugh, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Mylde около 1379 г. в местности клар, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 октября 1383 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности кэнтвелл, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Clopton nació aproximadamente 1321, en Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Walter De Clopton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Fitzhugh, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Katherine Mylde aproximadamente 1379, en Clare, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1383, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Kentwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
